items.title: Ilhan Omar defiant after town hall attack | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Representative Ilhan Omar said that "fear and intimidation" wouldn’t make her quit public service, a day after a man sprayed her with liquid during a town hall in Minneapolis, Minnesota. 

#ilhanomar #intimidation #townhall #trump #minneapolis #News #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: What to know about Nipah virus after cases emerge in India | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Two confirmed cases of the deadly Nipah virus in India prompted authorities in Asia to step up airport health screening to prevent the spread of the infection. But what is Nipah virus, and how worried should people be?

items.title: FBI searches Atlanta election office over 2020 vote fraud claim
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The FBI searched an election office in Georgia's Fulton County outside Atlanta, pursuing President Trump's false claims that his 2020 election defeat was the result of widespread voting fraud.

items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.content:

items.title: Kenyan court dismisses 1998 US Embassy bombing case
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Kenya's High Court dismissed a petition seeking to hold the government liable for alleged security failures linked to the 1998 US Embassy bombing, delivering a major setback to survivors and families who have spent nearly three decades fighting for accountability.
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #kenya #legal #court

items.title: ⚖️ Singer Chris Brown appears at London court
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>U.S. singer Chris Brown appeared in a London court for a brief hearing ahead of his trial later this year.

Brown is charged with attempting to inflict grievous bodily harm and of assault causing actual bodily harm for attacking a music producer in a London nightclub in 2023.

#chrisbrown #london #Court #legal #hearing

items.author: Reuters
items.content:

items.title: Trump rolls out 'Trump accounts' for babies
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>President Trump rolled out his government-supported investment accounts for babies in the United States and urged American businesses to contribute to employees' family accounts.
 
Trump and his Republican Party are seeking to address voters' affordability concerns ahead of the November midterm elections.
 
#economy #trump #account #affordability #cost
